name: Deviled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. COOK EGGS ACCORDING TO RECIPE NOS. F-4 AND F-G-2. COOL; REMOVE SHELLS FROM EGGS; CUT IN HALF LENGTHWISE. REMOVE YOLKS AND MASH THOROUGHLY. SET WHITES ASIDE FOR USE IN STEP 3.
2. BLEND MUSTARD, PICKLE RELISH AND SALAD DRESSING WITH YOLES. MIX UNTIL WELL BLENDED.
3. FILL THE WHITE HALF-SHAPES WITH YOLK MIXTURE, USING ABOUT 1 TBSP FILLING FOR EACH EGG HALVE.
4. SPRINKLE PAPRIKA ON TOP OR SEE NOTE 4.
5. SERVE IMMEDIATELY OR COVER AND REFRIGERATE UNTIL READY TO SERVE.
Note:
1. IN STEP 1, 11 LBS 6 OZ EGGS, UNSHELLED, FRESH, A.P. WILL YIELD ABOUT 10 LBS HARD COOKED, SHELLED EGGS.
2. IN STEP 3, A LARGE PASTRY TUBE MAY BE USED TO FILL EGG WHITES.
3. IN STEP 3, USE ABOUT 1 CUP CHOPPED PICKLES OR CUCUMBER, SWEET, DRAINED.
